notes:
Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.19.10
New Feature: UnWarp. After you PlateSolve, if the WCS has SIP (poly degree warp terms) this can unwarp your image to remove fisheye or pincushion lens distortion of your image restoring it to true astrometrical shape. This can be called directly in Star Stuff or from the Image Peeker's Astrometric Distortion Analysis tool.

Added DisplayP3 ICC profile for exporting images. This will preserve the vibrance you see in SASpro during export as some have noted a drop in saturation and brilliance when saving as tiff, jpg, and png.

Stacking Suite has a Stop button on the execution monitor, import/export stacking settings, and a bug fix in the filter name popup.

Bug fix with debayering with pixels at a 0.00 value.

POST1: Fixes fits vertical flip bug and PSF graph inconsistencies.
